summary: Active buzzer driven by GPIO with optional NPN transistor. Supports on/off control, timed beep, and pattern alarm.
notes: Active buzzer has built-in oscillator; just apply DC voltage to sound.
Use NPN transistor (e.g. S8050) for >20mA buzzers; STM32 GPIO max 25mA.
CT117E board buzzer is on PC15, active LOW via PNP transistor.

app_logic_snippets.loop:
Buzzer_Beep(200);  /* 200ms single beep */
Buzzer_Alarm(3, 100, 100);  /* 3 beeps, 100ms on, 100ms off */
app_logic_snippets.api_summary: Buzzer_Init() Buzzer_On() Buzzer_Off() Buzzer_Beep(ms) Buzzer_Alarm(count, on_ms, off_ms) Buzzer_IsActive()
app_logic_snippets.notes: Buzzer_Beep() and Buzzer_Alarm() are non-blocking; call Buzzer_Tick() in main loop to update timing. Buzzer_IsActive() returns 1 while alarm pattern is playing.
